/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/data_recorder_interfaces/libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/data_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/data_recorder_interfaces/msg/_float32_stamped_s.c.o CMakeFiles/data_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/data_recorder_interfaces/srv/_start_recording_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nuc/ros2_workspace/data_collection_ws/build/data_recorder_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
